name: stakeholder round-robin
prompt: Rotate through likely stakeholders and ask what each one would need to approve, operate, test, support, or audit the requirement.

calibration.business: Use business-facing wording: outcomes, policy, users, acceptance, and decision ownership; avoid implementation jargon.
calibration.technical: Use technical wording: data contracts, interfaces, constraints, failure modes, observability, and implementation surfaces.

evidence_contract: Stakeholder concerns must be grounded in the local requirement or domain context before becoming gaps.
